mapper.select: WITH user_contacts AS ( -- 获取当前用户的所有联系人（已过滤未删除） SELECT u.icon, ul.link_user_id AS linkId, u.nick_name AS nickName, ul.is_frequent, ul.remark, ul.is_delete FROM user_link ul INNER JOIN user u ON ul.link_user_id = u.id WHERE ul.user_id = #{userID} AND ul.is_delete = 0 -- 0否 1是 ), user_msgs AS ( -- 所有与当前用户相关的消息（无论发送/接收），并标记对方ID SELECT *, CASE WHEN emitter_id = #{userID} THEN receive_id ELSE emitter_id END AS other_user_id FROM user_msg WHERE #{userID} IN (emitter_id, receive_id) ), ranked_msgs AS ( -- 按对方ID分组，按发送时间倒序编号，取最新的一条 SELECT *, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY other_user_id ORDER BY send_time DESC) AS rn FROM user_msgs ) SELECT rm.content AS lastMsg, rm.send_time AS lastMsgTime, uls.icon, uls.linkId, uls.remark, uls.nickName, uls.is_delete, uls.is_frequent FROM user_contacts uls LEFT JOIN ranked_msgs rm ON uls.linkId = rm.other_user_id AND rm.rn = 1 ORDER BY rm.send_time DESC; -- 可按最后消息时间排序，无消息的联系人排在最后
mapper.insert: insert user_link(link_user_id, user_id, remark,is_frequent) values (#{linkID},#{userID},#{remark},#{isFrequent}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE is_delete = 0, remark = VALUES(remark), is_frequent = VALUES(is_frequent)
mapper.select: select exists(select 1 from user_link where user_id = #{userID} and link_user_id = #{linkID} and is_delete = 0 )
